name: Opening Out to Right and Left
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Fan, Basic Movements: Closed, Basic Movements: Open, Natural Opening Out Movement, Closed Hip Twist, Spiral (1/4 R on 1)
notes: Man is dancing a LF Cucaracha and RF Cucaracha. Turn on step 1 and 4 are made at end of previous beat. An Extended Forward Walk may be used on steps 3 & 6. Variations (Silver & Gold): Man may place R hand on Lady's back on 6, release L hand hold. Lady: place L hand on Man's R shoulder and turn 1/4 R into step 1 of following figure to 90 degree. Normal hold is regained on step 3 of following figure. Man may lead lady fwd towards his R side on last step of preceding figure and then turn 1/4 R on RF keeping his feet together, at the same time leading Lady to turn R. Lady LF fwd in line with RF towards Man's R side, then turn 1/2 R on LF to end LF back at a 90 degree angle to Man. No turn on step 1 of the following Opening Out Movement.

steps.action: LF to side, part weight, no turn
RF back, at a 90" angle to Man on his R side, 1/4 to R
comments: Turn is started on "&", "It may appear to be side step, but it really need to be back step, keep thighs tight together".

steps.action: RF fwd, then turn to end RF to side | 1/4 to L
comments: Lady places R hand on his L shoulder - no rush, just need arm to connect, delay putting Lady's R hand on Man's shoulder.

steps.action: LF back at a 90" angle to Man on his L side | 1/4 to L
comments: In advanced form, this step can be taken fwd in line with other foot, then turn 1/2 to end at the 90" angle to Man. Settle and pressure into hand first, before stepping LF back.

steps.action: F fwd, then turn to end LF to side | 1/4 to R
comments: In advanced form, this step can be taken fwd in line with other foot, then turn 1/2 to end at the 90" angle to Man.
